title: Useott's Ocean HUD
description: Ocean themed HUD, with textures based on the Heart of the Sea, Kelp, Trident and more!
body:
A HUD made with the new features of Resource Pack Version 16, which not only changes how the GUI is modified, and allows sprites to be animated with .mcmeta files!

 - Hearts become the heart of the sea and the eye opens in hardcore!
 - Vehicle health becomes nautilus shell
 - Hunger bar becomes kelp, and it's also ANIMATED!
 - Armor bar becomes turtle shells (helmets)

Note: The resource pack's intended version is meant for 1.20.2 and above! 1.20.1 is supported, but it's not animated.
